summary: The diff updates Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and AboutSection.tsx to reference the logo. However, all components use '/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png' as the src path instead of the required '/assets/generated/logo.png'. Additionally, there is no evidence that the logo image file was saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png as no new files were added in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded Growth Byte Digital logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png (overwriting any existing file)
missing_requirements.reason: No new files were added in the diff. The logo image file at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png is not present in the added files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: The src attribute uses the correct relative public path '/assets/generated/logo.png'
missing_requirements.reason: All four components use '/assets/generated/logo.dim_512x512.png' instead of the required '/assets/generated/logo.png'.
